canonicalPolicy.principle: Product reasoning consumes governed ledgers and source packets, not raw PowerPoint files directly.
canonicalPolicy.pilotPromotionRequirement: Source owner must approve the underlying BBE export/workbook and the metric mapping before promotion to canonical source data.
canonicalPolicy.reasoningGuardrail: Missing source coverage must block measured conclusions rather than trigger generated filler.

sources.title: 2026 Q1 United States Snacks BBE Automated Report
caveats: The deck is a preserved source report and has not been promoted to official canonical product data.
Chart cache values and processed text-derived metric records are suitable for prototype validation, not final business publication.
Embedded workbook data should be source-owner reviewed before pilot use or automated deck replacement.
